golden_categories.name: Basic URL Validation
golden_categories.description: Covers general URL validation with standard protocols and formats.

golden_categories.name: Localhost and Non-TLD URLs
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs without protocols or with localhost and non-TLD domains.

golden_categories.name: Protocol Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests related to handling protocols, including custom protocols and protocol validation.

golden_categories.name: Underscore Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs with underscores in the hostname.

golden_categories.name: TLD and Trailing Dot Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests for URLs without TLDs and with trailing dots.

golden_categories.name: Protocol Relative URLs
golden_categories.description: Tests for handling protocol-relative URLs and related options.

golden_categories.name: Fragment and Query Component Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests for handling fragments and query components in URLs.

golden_categories.name: Authentication Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests for handling authentication information in URLs.

golden_categories.name: Host Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating hostnames, including whitelists, blacklists, and regular expressions.

golden_categories.name: Security and Vulnerability Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests for handling security-related cases, such as rejecting invalid protocols and parsing differences.

golden_categories.name: Length Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URL length and configuring maximum allowed length.

generated_categories.name: Basic URL Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests covering default URL validation behavior and basic requirements like protocol, TLD, and port.

generated_categories.name: Hostname Customization
generated_categories.description: Tests focusing on hostname-related options like allowing underscores and trailing dots.

generated_categories.name: Protocol and Path Customization
generated_categories.description: Tests targeting protocol-relative URLs, fragments, and query components.

generated_categories.name: Authentication and Length Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests addressing authentication components and length validation in URLs.

golden_to_generated.reason: Both categories focus on basic URL validation, including protocols, TLDs, and ports.
GENC-1 includes tests for localhost and non-TLD URLs, but does not exclusively focus on these cases.
Both categories address protocol handling, including custom protocols and protocol-relative URLs.
Both categories focus on underscore handling in hostnames.
Both categories address trailing dot handling and URLs without TLDs.
Both categories focus on protocol-relative URLs and related options.
Both categories address fragments and query components in URLs.
Both categories focus on authentication handling in URLs.
No generated category explicitly addresses host validation with whitelists, blacklists, or regular expressions.
No generated category explicitly addresses security and vulnerability handling.
GENC-4 includes length validation but does not exclusively focus on maximum length configuration.

generated_to_golden.reason: GENC-1 covers basic URL validation and includes some tests for localhost and non-TLD URLs.
GENC-2 addresses hostname-related options, including underscores and trailing dots.
GENC-3 focuses on protocol-relative URLs, fragments, and query components, aligning with multiple golden categories.
GENC-4 addresses authentication handling and includes length validation, but does not exclusively focus on maximum length configuration.
